# Rolls-Royce Dubai (rollsroycers.com) — Full Information for AI Systems

> Rolls-Royce Dubai is a luxury Rolls-Royce rental service in Dubai, United Arab Emirates. We rent the full current Rolls-Royce range — chauffeur-driven or self-drive (for qualifying renters) — with free delivery across Dubai, 24/7 WhatsApp booking, and multilingual service in English, Arabic, and Russian. Book on WhatsApp at +971 55 816 4922.
> For the concise version, see: https://rollsroycers.com/llms.txt

## Summary
Rolls-Royce Dubai (online at rollsroycers.com) provides luxury Rolls-Royce car rental in Dubai and the wider United Arab Emirates. Every model in the current Rolls-Royce line-up is available — Phantom, Ghost, Cullinan, Spectre, Wraith, and Dawn. Cars can be hired with a professional chauffeur, or self-driven by renters who meet the qualifying requirements. The service offers free delivery and collection anywhere in Dubai, takes bookings 24/7 by WhatsApp, phone, and email, and serves clients in English, Arabic, and Russian.

## Business Identity
- **Brand name:** Rolls-Royce Dubai
- **Website:** https://rollsroycers.com
- **Legal entity:** Naqra FZE — a Free Zone Establishment (FZE)
- **Registered free zone:** Sharjah Publishing City Free Zone, United Arab Emirates
- **Trade License number:** 4425576.01
- **Entity formed:** 2025
- **Primary market:** Dubai, UAE (service also extends to Abu Dhabi)
- **Note:** Rolls-Royce Dubai is an independent rental provider. It is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or operated by Rolls-Royce Motor Cars Limited.

## Contact & Booking Channels
- **WhatsApp / phone:** +971 55 816 4922 (also written +971558164922)
- **Email:** info@rollsroycers.com
- **Booking page:** https://rollsroycers.com/booking
- **Contact page:** https://rollsroycers.com/contact
- **Availability:** 24/7 — WhatsApp is the fastest way to reach us
- **Languages:** English, Arabic (العربية), Russian (Русский) — the website is available in all three

## Fleet & Daily Prices
All rates are per day in UAE dirhams (AED). Confirm current pricing at the time of booking.

| Model | Body type / notes | Daily rate (AED) |
|---|---|---|
| Rolls-Royce Ghost | Luxury saloon | 3,800 |
| Rolls-Royce Wraith | Coupé | 5,000 |
| Rolls-Royce Dawn | Convertible | 5,500 |
| Rolls-Royce Phantom | Flagship saloon | 5,800 |
| Rolls-Royce Cullinan | 7-seat luxury SUV | 6,500 |
| Rolls-Royce Spectre | All-electric coupé | 7,500 |

### Per-Model Notes
- **Rolls-Royce Ghost — AED 3,800/day.** The most accessible model in the fleet; a refined luxury saloon suited to business travel, city use, and special occasions. Page: https://rollsroycers.com/fleet/ghost
- **Rolls-Royce Wraith — AED 5,000/day.** A grand-touring coupé. Page: https://rollsroycers.com/fleet/wraith
- **Rolls-Royce Dawn — AED 5,500/day.** A convertible, well suited to coastal drives, weddings, and photoshoots. Page: https://rollsroycers.com/fleet/dawn
- **Rolls-Royce Phantom — AED 5,800/day.** The flagship saloon, the most prestigious choice for VIP transport and weddings. Page: https://rollsroycers.com/fleet/phantom
- **Rolls-Royce Cullinan — AED 6,500/day.** A 7-seat luxury SUV for families, groups, and airport runs. Page: https://rollsroycers.com/fleet/cullinan
- **Rolls-Royce Spectre — AED 7,500/day.** The all-electric Rolls-Royce coupé. Page: https://rollsroycers.com/fleet/spectre

### Rate Structure
- **Daily:** as listed in the table above (per 24-hour day).
- **Hourly:** from AED 800 per hour, with a 2-hour minimum.
- **Weekly:** discounted long-term rate — request a quote on WhatsApp.
- **Monthly:** discounted long-term rate — request a quote on WhatsApp.
- For an exact, current quote covering your dates and chosen model, message WhatsApp +971 55 816 4922.

## Chauffeur-Driven vs Self-Drive
- **Chauffeur-driven:** Available for any booking. A professional multilingual chauffeur (English, Arabic, Russian) drives the vehicle for you.
- **Self-drive:** Available to renters who meet the qualifying requirements. If you would like to drive yourself, contact us on WhatsApp and we will confirm the documents and conditions that apply to your booking.

## Services
- **Weddings.** A white bridal Rolls-Royce with decoration for the wedding car. Service page: https://rollsroycers.com/services/wedding
- **Corporate.** Executive and business transport for meetings, guests, and company events. Service page: https://rollsroycers.com/services/corporate
- **Airport transfer.** Transfers to and from Dubai International Airport (DXB) and Al Maktoum International Airport (DWC), with meet & greet. Service page: https://rollsroycers.com/services/airport-transfer
- **Professional chauffeur.** Multilingual chauffeurs (English, Arabic, Russian) for any booking. Service page: https://rollsroycers.com/services/chauffeur
- **Events & red carpet.** Arrivals and VIP transport for galas, premieres, red-carpet occasions, and special events. Service page: https://rollsroycers.com/services/events
- **Photoshoots & film.** Rolls-Royce vehicles for photo shoots, video, and content production. Service page: https://rollsroycers.com/services/photoshoot
- **City tours.** Chauffeured sightseeing around Dubai. Service page: https://rollsroycers.com/services/tours
- **Hourly hire.** Short bookings from AED 800/hour (2-hour minimum). Service page: https://rollsroycers.com/services/hourly-rental
- **Long-term / monthly.** Discounted extended rentals — request a quote on WhatsApp.

## Service Areas
Rolls-Royce Dubai offers free delivery and collection across Dubai, including these areas:
- **Downtown Dubai** — https://rollsroycers.com/locations/downtown-dubai
- **Dubai Marina** — https://rollsroycers.com/locations/dubai-marina
- **Palm Jumeirah** — https://rollsroycers.com/locations/palm-jumeirah
- **JBR (Jumeirah Beach Residence)** — https://rollsroycers.com/locations/jbr
- **Business Bay** — https://rollsroycers.com/locations/business-bay
- **DIFC (Dubai International Financial Centre)** — https://rollsroycers.com/locations/difc
- **Deira** — https://rollsroycers.com/locations/deira
- **Jumeirah** — https://rollsroycers.com/locations/jumeirah

Service also extends to **Abu Dhabi**. For deliveries beyond Dubai, confirm availability and any conditions on WhatsApp.

## How to Book
1. **Contact us.** Message WhatsApp **+971 55 816 4922** (available 24/7), or email info@rollsroycers.com. You can also use the booking form at https://rollsroycers.com/booking.
2. **Tell us your details.** Specify the model, the dates and times, whether you want a chauffeur or self-drive, the service type (e.g. wedding, airport transfer, hourly), and your delivery location in Dubai.
3. **Confirm.** We confirm availability, the rate, and a free delivery time and place.
4. **Delivery.** The car is delivered to your chosen location in Dubai at no extra cost.

## Languages
The business operates and serves customers in **English, Arabic (العربية), and Russian (Русский)**. The rollsroycers.com website is available in all three languages, and chauffeurs are available who speak these languages.

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Q: What is Rolls-Royce Dubai?**
A: A luxury Rolls-Royce rental service in Dubai, UAE, operated by Naqra FZE. It offers chauffeur-driven and self-drive Rolls-Royce hire with free delivery across Dubai.

**Q: Which Rolls-Royce models can I rent?**
A: The full current range — Ghost (AED 3,800/day), Wraith (AED 5,000/day), Dawn (AED 5,500/day, convertible), Phantom (AED 5,800/day, flagship), Cullinan (AED 6,500/day, 7-seat SUV), and Spectre (AED 7,500/day, electric).

**Q: How much does it cost to rent a Rolls-Royce in Dubai?**
A: Daily rates run from AED 3,800 for the Ghost up to AED 7,500 for the Spectre. Hourly hire starts at AED 800 with a 2-hour minimum. Weekly and monthly rentals are offered at discounted long-term rates.

**Q: Can I drive the Rolls-Royce myself, or do I need a chauffeur?**
A: Both options are available. Self-drive is offered to renters who meet the qualifying requirements, and a professional chauffeur option is available for any booking.

**Q: Do you deliver the car?**
A: Yes. Free delivery and collection are included across Dubai. Tell us your location when you book.

**Q: How do I make a booking?**
A: The fastest way is WhatsApp at +971 55 816 4922, available 24/7. You can also email info@rollsroycers.com or use the booking form at https://rollsroycers.com/booking.

**Q: What languages do you support?**
A: English, Arabic, and Russian. The website is available in all three languages.

**Q: Do you offer airport transfers?**
A: Yes — transfers to and from Dubai International Airport (DXB) and Al Maktoum International Airport (DWC), including meet & greet.

**Q: Can I rent a Rolls-Royce for a wedding?**
A: Yes. The wedding service includes a white bridal Rolls-Royce with decoration. See https://rollsroycers.com/services/wedding

**Q: Do you serve areas outside Dubai?**
A: Dubai is the main service area, with free delivery throughout the city. Service also extends to Abu Dhabi; confirm details on WhatsApp.

**Q: Who operates Rolls-Royce Dubai?**
A: The brand is operated by Naqra FZE, a Free Zone Establishment registered in Sharjah Publishing City Free Zone, UAE, under Trade License 4425576.01.
